calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Aug-23-2004 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Sep-09-2004 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This Cause came as reassignment from the Presiding Judge Department for Court Trial/Prove-Up.
Judge Ollie Marie-Victoire, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Diana Padilla.
Michael C. Hall, Esq. for Plaintiffs: Chi Chu and Lan chu.
No appearance by the Defendant: Salvador Lopez.
9:15 a.m. Plaintiff's witness: Lan Chu was sworn and direct examined.
Exhibit 1- Lease agreement dtd. 02-01-02-------------------ID/EVID.
Exhibit 2- Three day notice dtd. 7-02-04-------------------ID/EVID.
The Court having heard the testimony and considered the evidence, grants judgment as follows:
Judgment in favor of plaintiffs and against defendant for restitution and possession of the premises at: 2250 Mission St., #202, San Francisco.
Rent and Damages $1,370.78
Attorney's Fees $400.00
Costs $188.30
Rental agreement declared forfeited.
Judgment signed in open court.
Counsel stipulated for return of exhibits.

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-20-2004 Off Calendar
